selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend roughly one hour daily on social media

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":62,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"hairdresser","city_of_living":"Bologna","employment_status":"employed full-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"no formal education","parent_2":"no formal education"},"current_marital_status":"married","children":2,"migration_status":"native-born Italian","psychological_feature":"anxious","religious_beliefs":"Hinduism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly one hour daily on social media","hobbies":["knitting","reading novels","board games","photography"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":82,"level":"high"},"conscientiousness":{"score":56,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":56,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":78,"level":"high"},"neuroticism":{"score":1,"level":"low"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for false information and to verify the accuracy of any posts or articles before sharing them. Additionally, using fact-checking websites and sources can help to identify and debunk false content. It is also important to be mindful of one's own online behavior and to avoid engaging in activities that could contribute to the spread of misinformation. By being informed and vigilant, individuals can play a role in maintaining the integrity of social media platforms and preventing the proliferation of fake content."
